faqs.note: Every FaqItem must use question/answer — not q/a or any other naming

relatedLinks.note: hrefs must match url_pattern format for existing entries — never invent URLs

entry_template.seoTitle: string — e.g. 'Mobile Car Detailing in Granite Bay | Drippy Suds' (max 65 chars)
entry_template.seoDescription: string — e.g. 'Professional mobile car detailing in Granite Bay, CA. Ceramic coatings, interior deep cleaning, and exterior restoration. We come to you.' (max 160 chars)
entry_template.heroTitle: string — e.g. 'Premium Mobile Detailing in Granite Bay' (max 80 chars)
entry_template.introParagraphs: array of 1–4 strings — each a paragraph of intro/SEO body copy specific to this city
entry_template.faqs: array of 3+ objects — each { question: string, answer: string }
entry_template.relatedLinks: optional array — each item { href: string, text: string } linking to related pages on this site; hrefs must match existing entries in url_pattern format (e.g. '/services/interior-detail', '/mobile-detailing-roseville', '/services')

faqs.note: Every FaqItem must use question/answer — not q/a or any other naming

relatedLinks.note: hrefs must match url_pattern format for existing entries — never invent URLs

entry_template.seoTitle: string — e.g. 'Paint Correction Sacramento | Drippy Suds' (max 65 chars)
entry_template.seoDescription: string — e.g. 'Mobile paint correction in Sacramento. Multi-stage compound and polish to remove swirls, scratches, and oxidation.' (max 160 chars)
entry_template.breadcrumbLabel: string — short label shown in breadcrumb, e.g. 'Paint Correction' (max 40 chars)
entry_template.introParagraphs: array of 1–3 strings — each a paragraph of intro/SEO body copy
entry_template.sections: array of 1–8 objects — each { heading: string, content: string }; content may use \n\n for paragraph breaks
entry_template.faqs: array of 3+ objects — each { question: string, answer: string }
entry_template.ctaText: string — short closing CTA sentence, e.g. 'Book paint correction and we\'ll come to you.'
entry_template.relatedLinks: optional array — each item { href: string, text: string } linking to related pages on this site; hrefs must match existing entries (e.g. '/mobile-detailing-sacramento', '/services', '/services/ceramic-coatings')

image.note: Must be a full URL (https://...) — typically a Supabase site-images URL or GALLERY constant value

entry_template.title: string — e.g. 'Ceramic Coating vs Wax: What Sacramento Drivers Should Choose' (max 80 chars)
entry_template.excerpt: string — e.g. 'A practical comparison of ceramic coatings and traditional wax for Sacramento weather and driving conditions.' (max 200 chars)
entry_template.image: string — full URL to the featured image (Supabase site-images bucket or GALLERY constant value)
entry_template.content: string — long-form article body in markdown or HTML

dynamic.note: BlogDetail also falls back to the Supabase seo_blog_drafts table when no static blogPosts entry matches the slug.
Runtime-only Supabase-backed city pages (seo_city_pages table). Separate from the prerendered /mobile-detailing-:slug landing routes — agents should add new cities to src/data/cityPages.ts, not here.

Renders the entry from src/data/servicePages.ts whose slug equals serviceSlug. Also reads optional CMS overrides from the Supabase seo_service_pages table at runtime, but the static data file is authoritative for prerender and structure.

NOT a single React Router :slug param. Each city has its own static <Route path="/mobile-detailing-{slug}"> entry in src/App.tsx. CityLanding parses location.pathname.replace('/mobile-detailing-', '') and looks the slug up in cityPages. Adding a new city requires BOTH inserting an entry above AI_CITY_ANCHOR in src/data/cityPages.ts AND inserting a new <Route path="/mobile-detailing-{slug}" element={<CityLanding />} /> above {/* AI_ROUTE_ANCHOR */} in src/App.tsx.
Catch-all. Must remain the last route in src/App.tsx.

src/components/home/HeroSection.tsx.description: Small uppercase eyebrow label above the hero H1 (e.g. 'Premium Mobile Detailing').

src/components/home/WhyChooseSection.tsx.description: Eyebrow label above the 'Why Choose Drippy Suds' H2.
Why Choose section H2 — preserve the <h2> wrapper and inline style; only change visible text.

prerender_registration.note: Plugin imports arrays directly — adding an entry to any data file automatically registers it for prerendering on the next build. No separate slug registration step is required. NOTE: Adding a new city ALSO requires inserting a matching <Route> in src/App.tsx above {/* AI_ROUTE_ANCHOR */} so React Router will mount CityLanding for the new path.

faq_schema_config.note: Inject FAQPage schema ALONGSIDE base LocalBusiness — never replace it. CityLanding and DynamicServicePage build a @graph array containing LocalBusiness, BreadcrumbList, and FAQPage and pass it through the SEO component's jsonLd prop. The prerender plugin (vite-plugin-prerender.ts) must also emit FAQPage JSON-LD inline in the static HTML for every prerendered page that has faqs — verify this is preserved when editing the plugin.

constants.GALLERY_IMPORT: Import all gallery image URLs from src/lib/images.ts via `import { GALLERY } from "@/lib/images";` — never hardcode Supabase URLs in components or data entries.
